name: diet-app
description: 减脂餐管理应用 - 轻食记

scripts.postinstall: cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.build: cd client && npm run build && cd ../server && npm run db:generate && npm run build
scripts.db:migrate: cd server && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:seed: cd server && npx prisma db seed
